character.name: Male brawler, bald head, warm
character.prompt:
Male brawler, bald head, warm dark tan skin, stocky muscular build.
Torn sleeveless canvas vest, dark pants, heavy boots. No weapons --
bare fists with wrapped knuckle guards. Left wrist amber crack accent
(#FF8800). Left shoulder forward in guard stance. Arena veteran,
visibly scarred. No purple, no void. Dark fantasy pixel art, Diablo 2
/ Hades style, heavy black outline, muted palette with amber accent,
transparent background.
